text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Disaster Services > Disaster Donations Coordination 2 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON AND WASHINGTON WILDFIRE INFORMATION OREGON WILDFIRE RESPONSE AND RECOVERY WEBSITE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about current wildfires and air quality. Offers a resource directory for wildfire preparation, response, and recovery. Includes evacuation information and a sign-up for emergency alerts through OR-Alert. Provides a list of verified organizations collecting donations for people impacted by wildfire. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER MULTNOMAH COUNTY MULTNOMAH COUNTY HELP FOR WHEN IT'S COLD WEBSITE DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about where to donate winter gear. Items needed vary by shelter. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
